---
name: Implementation Task
about: Template for a well-scoped implementation task
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Goal

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this task accomplishes and why. -->

## 📋 Description

<!-- Detailed context about the implementation — what needs to be built, changed, or fixed. -->

## 🔗 Dependencies

<!-- Blocking tasks, PRs, or external requirements. Use `- [ ] #123` for blocking issues. -->

- [ ] \#<!-- issue number -->

## 🗂️ Files to Change

<!-- Key files expected to be modified, in rough order of importance. -->

- `path/to/file.ts`
- `path/to/other.ts`

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

<!-- 
Checklist of concrete, testable outcomes. 
Mark items that can be verified in the PR review. 
-->

- [ ] Feature/fix implemented as described
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] New code is covered by tests
- [ ] No new warnings in the console

## 🧪 Testing Notes

<!-- How to verify this works: manual test steps, edge cases, or testing scripts. -->

## 📎 Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, logs, references, or related PRs. -->
